name: KKHTA Koishi
description:
My oldest and most popular bot Why is this bot more popular than the other well made koishi bot… This bot is just a passion project as of now once its fully done Im probably gonna move onto something else though I might comeback too make a sequel or maybe even another KKHTA character. A slightly altered version of KKHTA Koishi User POV is Male as of now… I could try doing a female POV but it will probably turn you into a guy anyways so until Janitor fixes that problem then Im just gonna leave the POV as it is as of now… Credit to ZUN for making Touhou and stuff so yeah I dont own the character if it wasn’t obvious.

I decided to change the pfp because the old one felt outdated (and also came from a later episode.)

This bot is OLD and has a low token count use at your own risk because I wont be updating it!

Tags: Touhou, KKHTA, Koishi
creator: Touhou Waifu Maker
